chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4341 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.18628/2022. 2. For orders on office objection No.6, 18 & 26. 3. For orders on CMA No.18462/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 21.7.2022 Mr.Muhammad Haroon Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner. ************* 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Petitioner is aggrieved by a document, a photostat copy of which is available at page 55, Annexure E/1, showing purportedly outstanding amount against him on account of gas consumptions, which has been filed by the Prosecutor before the trial Court viz. District & Sessions Judge, Central at Karachi. Grievance of the petitioner is that the trial Court is not entertaining his objections over this statement and the document. Although we are not satisfied with the maintainability of this petition as the trial Court is competent to look into this document and give its mind/judgment. However, we dispose of this petition with the observation that if the petitioner, who is accused in the case, files objections to this statement and the document, it shall be entertained and disposed of in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
